name: MITRE ATT&CK
notes: Use as the canonical ATT&CK technique, tactic, and data-source backbone.

name: CISA KEV
notes: Use for prioritizing CVEs known to be actively exploited.

name: OpenCTI
notes: Use as a central CTI platform and connector framework.

name: MISP
notes: Use for indicator exchange, galaxies, taxonomies, and event sharing.

name: ransomware.live
notes: Use for public leak-site monitoring, ransomware groups, and victim trend enrichment.

name: World Monitor
notes: Optional geopolitical and OSINT awareness source. Keep disabled by default and review output before operational use.
